title: Trade Matching
description:
A system that matches buy and sell orders to make trades. 

An order matching system or simply matching system is an electronic system that matches buy and sell orders for a stock market, commodity market or other financial exchange.
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Order_matching_system


Matching orders is the process by which a securities exchange pairs one or more unsolicited buy orders to one or more sell orders to make trades. 
https://www.investopedia.com/terms/m/matchingorders.asp

Matching orders is the process of identifying and effecting a trade between equal and opposite requests for a security (i.e., a buy and a sale at the same price).
